text_content: Typeform: People-Friendly Forms and Surveys Skip to main content Don't just collect leads—close them. Learn more about Typeform for Growth. AI ENGAGEMENT PLATFORM Build forms at the drop of a prompt Put a seasoned form expert to work with Typeform AI. It structures and designs at your command. Just type to build and edit. Get started—it's free Trusted by 95% of the Fortune 500 The form is only the beginning DATA COLLECTION Get 3.5x more data with a form expert Backed by over a decade of experience, Typeform AI helps you build expertly-designed, best-practice forms proven to get more responses. Get started—it's free NEW: CONTACTS & AUTOMATIONS Trigger action that brings in customers Collect and then act on customer contact data. As new data arrives it triggers automatic segmentation and follow-up emails, so you can convert faster than ever. See add-on Integrations Connect with hundreds of your business-critical tools See all integrations Why Typeform? After switching to Typeform, our customers agree: 96% have a better brand experience 95% gather more data, more easily 87% reveal deeper data insights Get started—it's free
